{"query":"Truth API launch date pricing tiers Trump Media investor data service","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1313,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://finance.yahoo.com/technology/articles/trump-media-technology-group-launches-130000261.html","title":"Trump Media and Technology Group Launches Truth API, a New Licensed Data Service for Financial Services Partners That Provides the Fastest Access to Truth Social’s Most Influential Accounts","content":"1 day ago — Truth API will be available to institutional customers beginning August 1, 2026. Truth API is designed for organizations most impacted by the ...
SARASOTA, Fla., July 16, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Trump Media & Technology Group (TMTG) today announced Truth API, a new business-to-business data feed that provides licensed, real-time access to posts from the highest-ranking Truth Social accounts.
The company has already signed up customers ahead of the launch and is onboarding additional partners in the weeks ahead.
Truth API is designed for organizations most impacted by the cost of a delay in information.
Organizations interested in licensing the new service can reach TMTG's Truth Social Data Licensing team at licensing@tmediatech.com.
TMTG operates Truth Social, a social media platform established as a safe harbor for free expression amid increasingly harsh censorship by Big Tech corporations; Truth+, a TV streaming platform focusing on family friendly live TV channels and on-demand content; and Truth.Fi, a financial services and FinTech brand incorporating America First investment vehicles."},{"url":"https://www.stocktitan.net/sec-filings/DJT/8-k-trump-media-technology-group-corp-reports-material-event-7d23cefa65c6.html","title":"Trump Media unveils Truth API data service | DJT 8-K Filing","content":"Truth API availability date: August 1, 2026 Historical archive start: 2022 Service coverage: 24/7 +2 more
Truth API availability date August 1, 2026 Anticipated date when Truth API will be available to institutional customers
Service coverage 24/7 Truth API is expected to provide continuous 24/7 coverage
Common stock par value $0.0001 per share Par value of Trump Media & Technology Group common stock
It also includes a historical archive of Truth Social posts dating back to 2022 for institutional customers.
The company indicated it is already onboarding partners and preparing for broader institutional access.

Truth is typically treated as a property \"Property (philosophy)\") of truthbearers, such as sentences \"Sentence (linguistics)\"), propositions, or beliefs that describe things as they are. It is closely related to truthfulness, a virtue associated with honesty, and to truthlikeness, a characteristic of theories that approximate the truth. The correspondence theory holds that a statement is true if it corresponds to facts. The semantic theory analyzes the truth conditions of sentences in an object language from the perspective of a metalanguage. Pluralists \"Pluralism (philosophy)\") assert that the definition of truth varies with the domain of analysis, while relativists maintain that the same statement can be true in one perspective and false in another.
